headline: Owens Corning (OC) Down 1.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Owens Corning (OC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Jacobs Secures Major SSEN Contracts for Grid Modernization Efforts
summary: J lands SSEN grid-modernization frameworks worth over $1B, spanning OT, cybersecurity and AI-enabled digital services in northern Scotland.

headline: Congressman Discloses First Stock Purchases Over A Year Later: Investors See Red Flags
summary: A congressman's first-ever stock purchases are drawing attention for the sectors bought and the timeliness of reporting.
